executive_summary: Internal Audit Checklist for Northwind Cloud Systems LLC: 1 risk(s), 2 gap(s) and 5 mitigation action(s) identified. Top risk: Control design partially adequate with evidence quality and contract alignment gaps Main evidence gap: No explicit owner assigned to remediation due dates
key_highlights: Control design partially adequate with evidence quality and contract alignment gaps
No explicit owner assigned to remediation due dates
No specific due dates provided for corrective actions
Provide privileged access approval evidence for standing vendor admin accounts
